description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a combination of flat and sloped roofs, and a mix of materials including wood, concrete, and glass. The structure is composed of two main volumes: a single-story section with a prominent sloped roof and a two-story section with a flat roof. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The property is landscaped with several mature trees and green lawns, and a paved walkway leads to the main entrance. The entryway is marked by a wooden door and a small overhang, providing a welcoming focal point. A fenced backyard and driveway are visible, indicating private outdoor space and vehicle access.
description: A modern house with a mix of flat and sloped roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings. The structure includes both single and two-story sections with wood, concrete, and glass elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, sloped roof, and landscaped yard with trees and a walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two-story section with a flat roof, driveway, and additional greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the flat-roofed two-story section, fenced backyard, and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the long sloped roof, rear garden, and the relationship between the single and two-story volumes.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wooden door, small overhang, and paved walkway, framed by landscaping.
